title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Arihant Publications South Asia Partners family as a Teacher in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Arihant Publications South Asia Partners:
Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications South Asia Partners!
